diagrams.title: HMM Tagger Structure for a Simple Sentence

visuals.title: HMM Tagger Structure for a Simple Sentence
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Part-of-Speech Tagging</text>
  
  <!-- Input sentence -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="300" height="40" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    The quick brown fox jumps
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from input to processing -->
  <path d="M210 110 L210 140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="10" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Processing box -->
  <rect x="110" y="150" width="200" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" opacity="0">
    POS Tagger
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from processing to output -->
  <path d="M210 200 L210 230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Output section -->
  <rect x="60" y="240" width="300" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Tagged words -->
  <g opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="70" y="250" width="50" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3"/>
    <text x="95" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white">The</text>
    <text x="95" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#1565C0">DT</text>
    
    <rect x="130" y="250" width="50" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3"/>
    <text x="155" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white">quick</text>
    <text x="155" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#1565C0">JJ</text>
    
    <rect x="190" y="250" width="50" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3"/>
    <text x="215" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white">brown</text>
    <text x="215" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#1565C0">JJ</text>
    
    <rect x="250" y="250" width="50" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3"/>
    <text x="275" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white">fox</text>
    <text x="275" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#1565C0">NN</text>
    
    <rect x="310" y="250" width="50" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3"/>
    <text x="335" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white">jumps</text>
    <text x="335" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#1565C0">VBZ</text>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Legend -->
  <text x="210" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" font-style="italic" opacity="0">
    DT: Determiner, JJ: Adjective, NN: Noun, VBZ: Verb
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
